name: Lumpia Shanghai (Phillipine Fried Egg Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 package Lumpia Wrappers Or Egg Roll Wrappers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pork, shrimp, water chestnuts, green onions, egg, and soy sauce in a bowl.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Place a level tablespoon of filling on each egg roll wrapper.
4. Fold the wrapper burrito style, tucking in the ends and sealing with a few drops of water.
5. Deep fry in hot oil until golden brown.
6. Drain on paper towels.
7. Serve with sweet and sour sauce.
